blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,861 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
